error.signature: SearchPhaseExecutionException: all shards failed: [query_shard_exception] Reason: failed to create query

verdict.summary: Search query failed across all shards. Malformed query DSL, field type mismatch, or corrupt shard data.

dead_ends.action: Retry the same query assuming transient failure
dead_ends.why_fails: If query syntax is wrong, retrying produces the same error every time. Check the root cause first.

dead_ends.action: Delete and reindex to fix corrupt shard data
dead_ends.why_fails: Reindexing is expensive and causes downtime. Most search failures are query issues, not data corruption.

workarounds.action: Check root cause in the nested 'caused_by' field of the error response
workarounds.how: The top-level message is generic; look at response.error.root_cause[0].reason for specifics

workarounds.action: Validate query against mapping: ensure field names and types match
workarounds.how: GET /my_index/_mapping  # then verify field types match your query expectations

workarounds.action: Use _validate/query API to debug query syntax
